## Concern Type

- [ ] Public-data provenance
- [ ] Privacy or personal-data risk
- [ ] Source license or attribution
- [ ] Inference presented as authority-grade truth
- [ ] Security-sensitive city layer
- [ ] Other

## Affected Area

Please link to the file, route, documentation page, or workflow.

## Description

Describe the concern without posting credentials, private data, personal data,
or exploitable security details.

## Suggested Handling

Describe the change or review step you recommend.

## Sensitive Details

If the report requires private details, do not include them here. Follow
`SECURITY.md` instead.
